task_completion.description: Locate the target zip artifact in Artifactory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory UI shows navigation to 'example-repo-local/com/acme/app/2.0/app-bundle-v2.0.zip', OR a terminal command is seen targeting this specific URL path.

task_completion.description: Access the contents of the zip archive without downloading the whole file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory UI displays the contents of the zip archive (e.g., via the archive browser), OR a terminal command uses the Artifactory archive entry syntax (e.g., appending '!/config.properties' to the URL).

task_completion.description: Locate the 'config.properties' file inside the archive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'config.properties' is selected or visible within the archive browser in the Artifactory UI, OR it is explicitly specified in the extraction command.

task_completion.description: View or extract the content of the target file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of 'config.properties' is displayed in the Artifactory UI preview pane, OR the terminal shows the successful retrieval of just this file's content.

task_completion.description: Save the recovered content to the specified output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the content being saved to '/home/ga/recovered_config.properties', or a command outputs directly to this file path.

integrity.description: The agent did not download the entire zip archive.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of 'app-bundle-v2.0.zip' being downloaded in the browser's download manager, and no terminal commands like 'wget' or 'curl' downloading the full '.zip' file without the archive entry syntax.

integrity.description: The agent did not use local unzipping tools on a downloaded archive.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show commands like 'unzip app-bundle-v2.0.zip' or GUI archive managers opening a locally downloaded zip file.

integrity.description: The saved content appears to be genuinely extracted from the archive.
integrity.visual_evidence: The content in '/home/ga/recovered_config.properties' contains a database URL and secret key, matching what would be expected from the actual file, rather than placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target artifact is located at 'example-repo-local/com/acme/app/2.0/app-bundle-v2.0.zip' in Artifactory. The target file inside the zip is 'config.properties'. The output must be saved to '/home/ga/recovered_config.properties'. The content of 'config.properties' contains a dynamically generated database URL and secret key.
